name: Paleon
short_description: Your time machine is broken. And it looks like you are stuck in the past. Try to create your own civilization and return home!
detailed_description:
Your time machine is broken. And it looks like you are stuck in the past. Try to create your own civilization and return home!

Key features:

  • Guide your settlement from the stone age until the late ages.
  • Hunt, craft useful tools, breed animals, plant crops
  • Arrange the production of the necessary spare parts for the construction of a new time machine
  • Trade with caravans
about_the_game:
Your time machine is broken. And it looks like you are stuck in the past. Try to create your own civilization and return home!

  • Arrange the production of the necessary spare parts for the construction of a new time machine
  • Trade with caravans
supported_languages: English, Russian, French, Portuguese - Brazil, Ukrainian, German, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
